title: Ron Zabel headlines Binance Live AMA on 14 September
content_html:
Mark the calendar: 14 September 2024, 14:00 UTC, on the official Binance Live room.

CEO Ron Zabel will walk through the live platform, the modules shipping over the next quarter, and where Cryptool fits inside the wider investment landscape. The session runs in three parts: an introduction segment, an X questions segment, and live audience Q&A.

Open to anyone. Bring real questions.
author: Cryptool
